prestazioni: Engine swap to a Roush Performance-built Ford Performance Aluminator XS 5.2L V8 (engine code: *Aluminator XS*), featuring a forged rotating assembly, CNC-ported heads, and a 12.0:1 compression ratio, paired with a custom billet crankshaft and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 750+ HP on E85 fuel with a Whipple 4.5L supercharger (Gen 5 2.95L rotor set) and a custom intercooler core by PWR North America (part #PWR-100001).

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Tremec TR-9070 7-speed dual-clutch transmission (OEM Ford GT Mk II unit) modified with a Quaife ATB differential and a custom billet aluminum bellhousing by G-Force Transmissions, paired with a Tilton triple-disc carbon clutch (part #64-1000) and a custom driveshaft by The Driveshaft Shop (3.5" chromoly, 1350-series U-joints).

Chassis and suspension overhaul with a full tubular chromoly roll cage by The Chassis Shop (Daytona Coupe-specific design, FIA Appendix K compliant), paired with Öhlins TTX46 coilovers (custom valving for Daytona Coupe chassis dynamics) and spherical bearing control arms by Speedtech Performance (part #ST-1000), with polyurethane bushings by Energy Suspension (part #9.5161R).
estetica: Full carbon fiber body replica by Superformance (Daytona Coupe-specific mold, part #SP-CF-001) with a custom clear-coated satin finish and exposed carbon weave on the roof, hood, and trunk, featuring a functional rear diffuser by APR Performance (part #APR-D-010000) and a custom front splitter by Anderson Composites (Daytona Coupe-specific design, part #AC-001).

Custom widebody conversion by Factory Five Racing (Daytona Coupe-specific kit, part #FFR-6500) with carbon fiber fender flares (part #FFR-6501) and custom 3-piece OZ Racing Ultraglegera wheels (18x10.5 front, 18x12 rear, part #OZ-UL18-105/12) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear).

Interior overhaul with a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and door cards by Katzkin (Daytona Coupe-specific pattern, part #KAT-001), paired with custom Recaro Pole Position seats (part #REC-2400) upholstered in black Alcantara with red stitching, and a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (part #MOMO-78-350) with a quick-release hub by NRG Innovations (part #NRG-200).
